isolated_rerun.interpretation: Same test fails on isolated re-run → NOT a flake; reproducible

blockers: e2e/06-claim-actions.spec.ts:54 (AI decision recording) reproducible failure — 2 consecutive runs same fail; record-ai-decision saga stuck in 'Збереження…' state. Cannot diagnose inside this commit-only gate per FORBIDDEN item 7.
limitations: PostManualV4 fix gate's 89/89 result is not contradicted — it was real on the same code at that point in time. Current 88/89 is on the SAME product source (HEAD 03725241) but with an environment that may have drifted (LocalDB accumulated rows, service warm state). The AIKB session between PostManualV4 and this gate did NOT touch product source.
The semantic regression (the rule introduced by the new E2E Semantic Assertion Rule gate) PASSES — the failure is in a pre-existing test path unrelated to claim-detail binding.
Chromium-only E2E coverage; Firefox / WebKit not exercised.
Cannot reset DB / restart backend cleanly inside this gate to disambiguate accumulated-state vs real regression — that itself would be a stateful action requiring its own gate.

88/89 = 98.9% pass; operator may choose to accept-with-limitations if AI decision recording flow is considered non-critical for this batch, but per gate spec Subphase 3 the strict reading is REWORK_REQUIRED.

next_safe_step.name: AI_DECISION_RECORDING_E2E_FLAKE_INVESTIGATION_V0.1
next_safe_step.description: Bounded investigation gate: (1) reset LocalDB to a known seeded state and re-run e2e/06-claim-actions.spec.ts alone; (2) if still fails on fresh DB → diagnose AiDecisionController / recordAiDecision saga / EF Core insert path for slowness or hang; (3) if passes on fresh DB → categorize as test brittleness to accumulated DB state; harden test (raise timeout or seed-isolate) OR document as known limitation. No commit/push of fixes in the investigation gate; produce a separate fix gate after cause is identified. After fix gate is accepted and 89/89 PASS is restored on this exact working tree, re-open COMMIT_AND_PUSH_DEV_REALISTIC_SANDBOX_BATCH_V0.1.
